name: Men's Matte Square Sunglasses - Goodfellow & Co™ Black: UV Protection, Recycled Plastic Frame
description:
Complete your sunny day look with the Matte Square Sunglasses from Goodfellow & Co™. These men’s sunglasses feature a classic square design with sharp black frames and brown lenses for a cool look that pairs well with most attire. UV protection helps block 99% to 100% of UV light. Perfect for sunny days at the beach or a drive through the countryside, these men's square sunglasses are sure to have you looking as good as you'll feel.

100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
